introSection: Topo Zorro is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy.
fullText: Topo Zorro is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SDC currently located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy.
